title: SAM config.json
description: Project-level workflow configuration for SAM. Tune process weight without breaking the state machine. All defaults preserve current full-process behavior (except documentation_update, which defaults to every_milestone). Missing file or missing key = default.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

code_review.description: How often Principal.CodeReview runs after Staff.ImplementationExecution. 'every_phase' = always (default). 'every_milestone' = only on the last phase of each milestone. 'never' = skip code review entirely, route straight to PM.StatusUpdate.

formal_approval.description: How often Human.PhaseApproval runs. 'every_phase' = always (default). 'every_milestone' = only on the last phase of each milestone. 'never' = skip formal approval entirely (Human.ApproveMilestone still applies).

documentation_update.description: How often Writer.DocumentationUpdate runs. 'every_phase' = always. 'every_milestone' = only on the last phase of each milestone (default). 'never' = skip documentation updates entirely.

review_strictness.description: Threshold for REQUIRED vs. SUGGESTED findings in Principal.CodeReview. 'strict' = deviations from STANDARDS/DECISIONS are REQUIRED; best-practice violations are pushed harder. 'balanced' = correctness issues and clear standard violations are REQUIRED; style preferences are SUGGESTED (default). 'pragmatic' = only correctness and security issues are REQUIRED; everything else is SUGGESTED.

re_review_trigger.description: When Staff.ReviewReconciliation changes code, should it always trigger a re-review? 'required' = always route back to Principal.CodeReview if any code changed (default). 'auto' = AI judges whether the scope/nature of changes warrants re-review and documents reasoning.
